active_work.text: Phase 1 public-claim lint slice: README, ROADMAP, NEWS, pkgdown navigation, the dashboard README, and any local Documenter.jl source now have to link back to docs/design/168-r-julia-finish-capability-matrix.md. The validator also rejects public release-promotion wording and reserved Julia-control claims outside the release gate. Rose signoff remains active for fitted/planned/missing/unsupported row audit.
